message:
fix: clamp download progress to 100% and improve help popup key styling

Model download (model_download.rs):
- Clamp progress percentage to 100.0 max before casting to u8, preventing
  overflow when total_downloaded briefly exceeds grand_total due to
  concurrent writes or rounding.

Help popup (app.rs):
- Restyle key hints in the help popup footer to individually highlight
  each key (P, arrows, PgUp/PgDn, Home/End, Esc) with the key_style
  while keeping descriptions in muted_style, improving visual scannability.
- Add Home/End=jump hint to the unpinned footer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
